playbook.intent: Two ceremonies at sprint close: review (showcase plus stakeholder feedback) and retro (team-internal improvement). Exit with a reviewed increment plus 1-3 concrete action items owned by named people.
playbook.scope: Two ceremonies at sprint close: review (showcase plus stakeholder feedback) and retro (team-internal improvement). Exit with a reviewed increment plus 1-3 concrete action items owned by named people.

success-criteria.criterion: Demo path passes a dry run
Stakeholder feedback captured against framing questions
Actions visible in next sprint board

stage.name: Review prep
stage.intent: Bring the right artifact to demo.

tasks.task: Pick the smallest end-to-end slice to demo
Test the demo path on staging once
Prepare a 3-question framing for stakeholder feedback

stage.decision-gate: Advance when demo path passes a dry run.

stage.name: Run the review

tasks.task: Probe stakeholders with the framing questions
Capture feedback in a structured doc

stage.decision-gate: Advance when feedback is captured against the framing questions.

stage.name: Switch context to retro
stage.intent: Reset the room for team-internal work.

tasks.task: Re-frame the next hour as team-internal
Open with a quick energy check

stage.decision-gate: Advance when the room is team-only and energy-checked.

stage.name: Rotate retro format
stage.intent: Use a different lens each cycle.
stage.decision-gate: Advance when 3-5 themes are surfaced (not raw vent).

stage.name: Pick action items

tasks.task: Pick 1-3 actions the team will actually do
Assign each to a named owner
Carry over only actions that survived from last retro

stage.decision-gate: Advance when each action has a named owner + check-back.

stage.name: Publish + carry forward

tasks.task: Post the actions to the team channel
Add them to the next sprint as visible items
Log review feedback for product/PM follow-up

stage.decision-gate: Required: actions visible in the next sprint's board.

extra.value: {human: faion get-content run-sprint-review-retrospective-back-to-back --format md, agent: faion get-content run-sprint-review-retrospective-back-to-back --format context, json: faion get-content run-sprint-review-retrospective-back-to-back --format json}
[{version: 1.0.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: 'Initial v2 playbook drafted from F-059-063 chunk-04, role-manager-manager'}]
